apps.title: Applications
apps.subtitle: View business applications, manage access assignments and app roles

catalogManaged.notice: Applications and roles are managed by the registry. To add or change one, use the registry editor.

table.empty: No applications yet; register one in the registry editor

toast.grantProjected: Access granted and synced to the identity provider
toast.grantPending: Access granted; identity provider projection is syncing
toast.revokeRetry: Revoked; identity provider projection is retrying

detail.notFound: Application does not exist or has been removed

keycloak.title: Keycloak binding
keycloak.description: The platform ensures the client and access role exist at registration; this page is read-only
keycloak.hint: Granting access projects this client role onto the user; to change the client itself, use the Keycloak console

assignments.revokeConfirmDescription: This removes the user access to this application and the client role on the identity provider. This action cannot be undone.
assignments.grantDescription: Pick a platform user to grant access to this application

roles.name: Name
roles.empty: No roles yet; register roles in the registry first

roleAssignments.assignDescription: Assign an in-app role to a user who already has access
roleAssignments.scopeIdHint: Not needed for the global scope
roleAssignments.revokeConfirmDescription: The business application will receive a role change event via webhook. This action cannot be undone.
roleAssignments.requiredMissing: Please select a role and a user

sync.title: Projection sync status
sync.description: Distribution of projection status across access records (latest {sampled} of {total})
sync.reconcileHint: Failed projections are retried automatically by background jobs; an hourly reconcile job compares identity provider state with platform facts and repairs drift.
sync.empty: No access records yet; projection status will appear here after access is granted
